scripts.dev:mcp: uv run python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, r'mcp/src'); from server import main; main()"
scripts.dev:mcp:http: uv run python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, r'mcp/src'); from server import main_http; main_http()"
scripts.dev:mcp:document-review: uv run python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, r'mcp/src'); from servers.document_review.server import main; main()"
scripts.dev:mcp:listing-assist: uv run python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, r'mcp/src'); from servers.listing_assist.server import main; main()"
scripts.dev:mcp:map-view: uv run python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, r'mcp/src'); from servers.map_view.server import main; main()"
scripts.dev:mcp:quote-compare: uv run python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, r'mcp/src'); from servers.quote_compare.server import main; main()"
scripts.dev:mcp:submission-pack: uv run python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, r'mcp/src'); from servers.submission_pack.server import main; main()"
scripts.format: pnpm exec biome check --write . && uv run ruff format .
scripts.format:check: pnpm exec biome format . && uv run ruff format . --check
scripts.lint: pnpm run lint:ts && pnpm run lint:py
scripts.test: pnpm run test:py && pnpm run test:fe
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:ts && pnpm run typecheck:py
scripts.typecheck:py: uv run --frozen mypy -p src && uv run --frozen mypy mcp/src mcp/tests
scripts.check: pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck
